questionHtml:
What is the percentage risk of a child inheriting Huntington’s disease if only one parent has the disease?

A. 0 %

B. 25 %

C. 50 %

D. 100 %

meta.title: What is the percentage risk of a child inheriting Huntington’s disease if only one parent has the disease? A. 0 % B. 25 % C. 50 % D. 100 %
